resources.string: Paste a YouTube or Google Drive link below
Links your phone to 2hotatl.com so you can control it from the website. Works on WiFi or mobile data — no USB or same network needed. Reads screen layout only; never records video.
Sign up once. Your phone connects over WiFi or mobile data — no USB or same network.
You\'re linked — open 2hotatl.com on any computer.
This lets 2hotatl read your screen and send taps remotely. Required for the website to control your phone.

Settings will open.

1. Find Watch Sync
2. Turn it ON
3. Come back to this app
● Live — open 2hotatl.com to control this phone
Turn on Watch Sync in Settings → Accessibility
1. Keep this app installed and Watch Sync ON\n2. Open 2hotatl.com on any browser (WiFi or mobile data)\n3. Pick your phone — screen and controls sync automatically
Keeps your phone connected to 2hotatl when the screen is off
Ready for remote control — WiFi or mobile data
